title: China condemns new Taiwan intelligence tip website, vows ‘resolute countermeasures’
summary_full: Beijing has reacted sharply to Taiwan's latest intelligence initiative designed for Chinese nationals, warning of 'strong counteractions' and charging Taipei with provoking further strains across the Strait. The website, introduced by Taiwan's National Security Bureau, is intended as a secure means of communication, reflecting increasing frustration among the Chinese populace due to economic hardships and stringent government measures.
